subject: session date
fact: The session is dated February 1st, 2026.

subject: stalactite height
fact: Stalactites cling to the ceiling several hundred feet above the party.
source_quote: ceiling several hundred feet above you

subject: Great Hall dimensions
fact: The Great Hall is a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long.
source_quote: nearly one hundred feet wide and long

subject: fire giant count
fact: A single fire giant is drilling the troops.

subject: ogre count
fact: The fire giant is drilling two ogres.

subject: hell hound count
fact: The fire giant is drilling three hell hounds.

subject: Felkur sleight of hand first attempt
fact: Felkur rolls a 5 on his first sleight of hand attempt.
source_quote: He roles a 5 sleight of hand

subject: Felkur sleight of hand second attempt
fact: Felkur rolls a natural 20 on his second sleight of hand attempt.
source_quote: Felkur rolls a natural 20 sleight of hand

subject: Felkur sleight of hand third attempt
fact: Felkur rolls an 18 on his third sleight of hand attempt.

subject: Akritas damage on fire giant
fact: Akritas does over 50 points of damage with a critical hit on the Fire Giant.

subject: Daein damage on fire giant
fact: Daein lands a critical hit doing 17 points of damage on the giant.

subject: Hell hound fire breath targets
fact: One Hell Hound uses fire breath on the Owlbear and Bramgrim.

subject: Felkur ice damage on hell hounds
fact: Felkur's cannon causes 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2.
source_quote: cause 17 points of ice damage on Hell Hound 1 and Hell Hound 2

subject: hallway distance
fact: The hallway turns west some 35 feet away from the doorway.
source_quote: hallway turns west some 35 feet away

subject: trap door width
fact: An ogre is pulling water out of a five foot wide trap door.

subject: Fire Giant damage on Daein
fact: The Fire Giant strikes Daein with a critical hit doing 50 points of damage.

subject: Daein damage reduction
fact: Daein uses a psionic ability to reduce the damage from 50 to 45.

subject: Owlbear damage on ogre
fact: The owlbear does 38 points of damage on ogre 2.
source_quote: does 38 points of damage on ogre 2

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: Bramgrim's 5th level spirit guardian deals 19 points of damage to the Fire Giant and the Ogre.

subject: Akritas damage on fire giant
fact: Akritas strikes the Fire Giant twice for 28 points of damage.

subject: Toll the Dead damage
fact: The Giant takes 27 points of necrotic damage from Toll the Dead.
